pi_items.source: Cross-verified in setup_task.sh:14 and export_result.sh:5, both reference identical path
Task description states 'rectangle 60 feet wide'. Verifier (line 126) checks abs(w - 60) < 1.0. Geometry derivation: setback_side=5, lot_width=60 → right edge at 60-5=55 (verified in line 144).
Task description states '100 feet deep'. Verifier (line 126) checks abs(h - 100) < 1.0. Geometry derivation: setback_rear=10, lot_depth=100 → rear at 100-10=90 (verified in line 145).
Task description states 'Front setback is 25\''. Verifier (line 145) checks abs(sy1 - 25) < 1.0. House placement: centered at y=25 (line 164), matches front setback.
Task description states 'Rear setback is 10\' from the top'. Verifier (line 145) implicitly checks this via sy2=90, derived as 100-10=90. Calculation confirmed in verifier comment line 136.

Task description states 'Side setbacks are 5\' from left and right sides'. Verifier (lines 144) checks sx1=5 and sx2=55 (60-5). House centering: (60-30)/2=15, left edge at 15 (which is 5+10, accounting for centered width).
Task description states '30\' x 50\' rectangle'. Verifier (line 163) checks hx1=15 and hx2=45, derived as: centered_x = (60-30)/2 = 15, so width = 45-15 = 30.
Task description states '30\' x 50\' rectangle'. Verifier (line 164) checks hy1=25 and hy2=75, derived as: front at 25 (setback), depth = 75-25 = 50.

Task description specifies exact layer names with colors: 'Layer \'LOT_LINES\' (Red)', 'Layer \'SETBACKS\' (Blue)', 'Layer \'BUILDING\' (Yellow)', 'Layer \'TEXT\' (White)'. Verifier (line 98) checks identical list.

privileged_info_summary: Task is a synthetic CAD drawing exercise with no external data input. All metadata values are design specifications that are verified as internally consistent across task description, setup/export scripts, and verifier logic. Lot dimensions: 60 feet wide by 100 feet deep starting at origin (0,0). Setbacks: 25 feet front, 10 feet rear, 5 feet sides, creating buildable area from (5,25) to (55,90). House: 30 feet wide by 50 feet deep, centered horizontally (15,25 to 45,75), with front wall on front setback line. Four required layers: LOT_LINES, SETBACKS, BUILDING, TEXT. Output file expected at /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/residential_site_plan.dxf.
